name: 折叠刀（★） | 外表生锈
descriptionEn: Flip knives sport a Persian-style back-swept blade with an acute point. While the point itself may be fragile, the overall design of the flip knife's design is surprisingly durable. This memento from Siege is still perfectly operational although the exterior surfaces have rusted. Scars build character
descriptionZh: 具有波斯风格的折叠刀有着锋利的后弯刀片。虽然刀的尖端较易破碎，但从折叠刀的整体设计来看，它出奇的耐用。 这把来自围攻之势的纪念武器可以用一句话来形容：“败絮其外，金玉其中”。 疤痕塑造品格
